title: ACM Math Tools
description: Suite of mathematical tools — graphing calculators, matrix tools, and logic programs — built as SIG Math Leader at UIC's ACM chapter.
overview: As SIG Math Leader at UIC's ACM chapter (the biggest CS club at UIC), I managed a team of students and led the development of a suite of advanced mathematical tools spanning calculus, linear algebra, and discrete math.

sections.heading: Tools Built
bullets: Integral & Riemann Sum Graphing Calculator — Python tool using NumPy and Matplotlib for interactive calculus visualization
Reduced Row Echelon Matrix Calculator — C++ implementation of Gaussian elimination for linear algebra operations
Discrete Math Truth Table Logic Program — Boolean expression evaluator and truth table generator
